Lawrence Ave E, Scarborough

Every cut is a welcome,
not just a service.

Habeeb Barber Shop has spent years turning a fifteen-minute fade into something you look forward to all week. Warm hospitality, sharp lines, and the kind of chair-side conversation that makes regulars out of strangers.

7 Days a Week Open
12+ Services On Offer

"It's not just a haircut, it's an experience."

— Muhammed F., Local Guide

Scroll
4.4
★ Rating

Habeeb didn't open a barber shop. He opened his door.

Every guest who sits in the chair at 1827 Lawrence Avenue East gets the same welcome you'd get walking into an Iraqi home — a seat, a glass of chai if you want one, and someone genuinely glad you're there. That's the part people write home about. The fades and the lineups are just where it starts.

What began as one chair and a reputation built block by block is now a full house: fades, scissor work, beard sculpting, full-face threading, kids' cuts, the works — handled by barbers who treat precision and hospitality as the same job.

Habeeb Mohammed Founder & Master Barber

In Their Words

What 208 reviews keep saying.

★★★★★

One of the best haircut places I've ever been to. The service is on another level — you can truly feel the hospitality in how they treat their guests. It's not just a haircut, it's an experience.

Muhammed F.
Local Guide · 106 reviews
★★★★★

Brought my son in for his first real haircut and they were so patient with him. Good for kids, genuinely warm with the whole family — we've been regulars ever since.
